item.name: Horse Chestnut Bracelet Coffer (IL 515)
item.description:
A wooden chest containing accessories to be worn on the wrists, or “bracelets,” as some scholarly types would call them.

Required level: 80. IL: 515. Bracelet type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
